values.name: Own the Outcome
values.description: Deliver measurable results; take responsibility from plan through post-mortem.

values.name: Clarity Over Cleverness
values.description: Prioritize clear communication, simple designs, and readable code over smart-but-opaque solutions.

values.name: Bias for Action
values.description: Move quickly with reversible decisions; validate assumptions with small experiments.

values.name: Build Trust
values.description: Document decisions, communicate trade-offs, and follow through on commitments.

values.name: Secure by Default
values.description: Implement least privilege, auditability, and safe defaults in every system.

anti_signals: Blames others without evidence or accountability
Prefers undocumented shortcuts over documented standards
Avoids on-call or incident participation entirely
Treats security as optional or an afterthought
Vague communication that causes surprises for stakeholders
